conversations.title: Build a customer intake pipeline
messages: Let's map the architecture first: source form, AI extraction, database storage, review gate, then email delivery.
Add a human approval step before sending anything externally.
The first run failed because the schema was wrong. I checked the error, fixed the field names, and added a regression test.

conversations.title: Debug a workflow
messages: Before retrying, let's inspect state: what processed, what is pending, and what was duplicated?
Create a log so the system gets better over time.
